title: lappula caespitosa
intro: Lappula caespitosa, also known as the annual delphinium, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Lappula caespitosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
